'''Viper Alpha''' was a [[Mandalorian Crusaders]] [[Squad/Legends|squad]] armed with [[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk war droids]] that fought at the [[Battle of Ossus (Great Sith War)|Battle of Ossus]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].
